inputs.text: A young Korean woman with dark brown wavy shoulder-length hair stands in profile view, framed through a mossy stone archway on a foggy forest trail at dawn. Shot on 35mm lens, environmental portrait. Soft window-like diffused morning light creates a Rembrandt triangle shadow across her delicate features and button nose. She wears a school uniform inspired preppy look — navy blazer, pleated skirt, knee socks, loosened tie. Her expression is elegant and sophisticated, chin slightly lifted, gazing into the mist. Dewy flawless skin, subtle gradient lip tint, soft brown eyeshadow. Wisps of fog curl around her silhouette. Shallow depth of field, muted earth tones, ethereal atmosphere. Photorealistic, editorial fashion photography, no text, no watermarks.
